channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mattress dumped on street, 22nd July
item.description:
Mattress fly tipped at 11pm Tuesday 21st July. I know the flat responsible and have pictures of those involved. I have a video for evidence

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Marks Rise, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked pathway, 22nd July
item.description:
Outside on tbe pavement of 69 towards the chemist is a industrial bin blockubgctge public pathway no room for mobility scooter or elerly to pass with an overhedge in another front garden which i caught my head on this is on thecway to tbe chemist. Cars parked either side, unable to cross. Ths is a private bin for a business tbst run from this house cantering. Also delivety bike chained to lampost lengthways across the path.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Place, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned. No registration plates, 22nd July
item.description:
Car abandoned no registration number plate
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oak Grove Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping outside 237 Burrage Road, 22nd July
item.description:
Photos taken 22nd July 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned / Lived in Caravan, 22nd July
item.description:
This is next abandoned / lived in caravan on the street. No number plates yet someone living in it. Emptying food waste into peoples bins and excrement into the gutter. Please have it removed. This is simply not acceptable

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Road, Highgate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass bottle broken on pavement, 22nd July
item.description:
At gunner lane bus stop glass bottle broken on pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gunner Lane, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At least two cars no license plates, 22nd July
item.description:
Area is full of cars that don’t move include a caravan, 2 have no plates and do appear to be drivable. Either they are abandoned or business is using up limited residential space for their garage business.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pollard Walk, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 22nd July
item.description:
A shower screen and bucket were dumped by our been area and a few steps further up loads of rubbish on the wall shown in picture

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 357, Norwood Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress blocking the pavement, 22nd July
item.description:
A mattress dumped on the pavement by 1A Ravenscroft road today. No one is taking responsibility for it. Its blocking the pavement and unsightly. Once one item is dumped people start to think its ok to do so hence reporting it asap. Thank you Shaun
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste flytipped, 22nd July
item.description:
Just watched the family members of 10 Oslo Square flytipp their garden waste (mainly from their Laural hedge) and are still doing so as I report this. The most troubling thing is, they have a large bonfire alight, at this time, whilst the ground is tinder dry and a hosepipe ban is about to come into force. I truly hope they do not set any other gardens or property alight. This problematic family are a nuisance and a liability to all neighbours!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norway Gate, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bay markings not visible, 22nd July
item.description:
There used to be bay markings for 5 bays but they have worn away, causing people to only park 4 cars in the space for 5.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pollard Walk, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bags on road, 22nd July
item.description:
Fly tipped bags are sitting in road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linkfield, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Laughing gas canister, 22nd July
item.description:
Although this time there is only 1 gas canisters it is quite a common problem in this vicinity. As always there was other rubbish which I have cleared.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Forest Way, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing panel on turn left sign post, 22nd July
item.description:
Missing panel on turn left sign post at corner of Belvedere Buildings. Black code on yellow stickers hard to read, but appears to be 5 1451 S[damaged]

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belvedere Buildings, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 22nd July
item.description:
Hi It has been well over a month since Foxhole Road has seen a road sweeper. The end of the road is full of litter. It is attracting foxes, pigeons and I have seen a rat on several occasions. Tattershall Path is also full of litter.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foxhole Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin by 394 bus stop, 22nd July
item.description:
Bin overflowing for weeks now With tape around it please pick rubbish or replace the bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pritchards Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mirror and wood left by the bins, 22nd July
item.description:
More consistent fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ada Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food prep unauthorised, 22nd July
item.description:
People are ignorant to the signs stating that no food prep to be allowed. This is while they are having a full football match and making lots of noise in the late evening.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cole Close, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bins, 22nd July
item.description:
Two wheelie bins have been left in the street. They do not belong to any nearby properties.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peak Hill Gardens, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped business waste on footpath, 22nd July
item.description:
Dumped business waste on the footpath

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bull Lane, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet
